state.description: Snake head X position in pixels
Snake head Y position in pixels
Snake X velocity in pixels per frame
Snake Y velocity in pixels per frame
Current number of cells in the snake's body
The length the snake will attempt to maintain, increases when eating apples
Regular apple X position in pixels
Regular apple Y position in pixels
Number of bonus apples currently spawned on the screen
Number of wall obstacle segments (groups of 3) currently on the screen
True if a speed burst is currently active
Remaining frames for the current speed burst
The actual number of frames skipped between game updates, affecting game speed.
state.js_expression: var baseSkip = window.__snakeFrameSkip != null ? window.__snakeFrameSkip : 3; (window.__snakeSpeedBurst > 0 && window.__snakeSpeedBurstTimer > 0) ? Math.max(1, baseSkip - window.__snakeSpeedBurst) : baseSkip

mods.label: Game Frame Skip
mods.description: Number of frames to skip before updating game state. Higher value means slower game.

mods.label: Bonus Apple Count
mods.description: Number of extra bonus apples maintained on screen.

mods.label: Wall Obstacle Count
mods.description: Number of wall segments (groups of 3) maintained on screen.

mods.label: Apple Growth Points
mods.description: Number of cells the snake grows when eating a regular apple.

mods.label: Snake Initial Length
mods.description: The starting length of the snake when the game begins or resets.

mods.label: Grid Cell Size
mods.description: The size of each grid cell in pixels. Affects visual scale and movement unit.

mods.label: Speed Burst Amount
mods.description: Extra frame skip reduction applied during a speed burst (higher value means faster burst).

mods.label: Speed Burst Duration
mods.description: Number of frames a speed burst lasts when activated.
